title: Billy from Karlson!!
description: This mod adds Billy from the game Karlson in all it's glory by not looking cursed like other mods :)
body:
## Hi, ever wondered what it would be like to have Billy in Minecraft???
### Well, now you can!!

With this mod I wanna introduce Billy to the Minecraft world, you can craft it and punch it as much as you like, like in the original game, billy follows you around **AS LONG AS IT HAS BEEN TAMED!!!**
That means that for it to actually follow you you need to tame it first by giving him buckets of milk to have healthy and **THICC**!! bones.

_This is the Crafting Recipe:_

![This is the crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6efbe57757c72e45c7a2319dc0a799511a409011.png)

_This is the Crafting Recipe **IF** it breaks:_

![broken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ecde6e8c5bd79c591fa5d090dfbe64431874d3b.png)


Also if you just want Billy to stop following you EVERYWHERE just **use a lead on a fence** and that'll do the trick

Here's the "How I made it" video (although it's in spanish...)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pASDANWQdIE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod has been created using **MCreator**, **Blockbench** to create the model and **Geckolib** to make the animations!!
